_note: broken-deployment.yaml SHIPS with the seeded fault (image :2.0, an unmirrored tag -> ImagePullBackOff). The plan applies it as-is (= the broken state a learner starts from) plus a Service, confirms not-Ready, then replicates the learner's editor edit (:2.0 -> :1.0) with sed and re-applies to recover.

steps.run:
oc apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: {name: hello-dcs}
spec:
  selector: {app: hello-dcs}
  ports: [{port: 8080, targetPort: 8080}]
EOF
envsubst < ~/exercises/broken-deployment.yaml | oc apply -f -
sleep 20
sed 's/hello-dcs:2.0/hello-dcs:1.0/' ~/exercises/broken-deployment.yaml | envsubst | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
